title: GhastTopia
description: Adds Happy Ghast Variants to the game over 20+ will you collect them all?
body:
This mod aims to add many new happy ghast variants to your world. Each biome could give you a new happy ghast that looks like the environment it was Hydrated in. 

The Mod has 21 unique variants, all biomes supported are below plus their respective variants such as savanna_plateu or any others.

- Plains, Meadows(vanilla minecraft texture)
- All the Ocean variants, warm ocean + lukewarm, differ from the rest
- Snow Biomes, such as Ice Spikes and snowy taiga
- End dimension
- Cherry Grove
- Mushroom island
- Forests and Birch Forests
- Dark Oak Forest
- Jungle
- Taiga, and Old Growth Taiga
- Pale Garden
- Deep Dark, along with Lush Caves
- Desert and Badlands
- Plus some hidden textures

All these happy Ghast Variants are able to be obtained in survival, even the hidden ones, if any ghasts are spawned in in a biome not on the list they will be assigned the vanilla texture. I plan on adding more if any new biomes are added into the game or come up with a fancy design for a new one/
